settings.ggXHYiMjwOM_text:
Eloa’s 3D Compression Zones™ create resistance around your core, forcing your muscles to work harder with every movement. 

 

When your muscles work harder, they burn more energy to produce it — even during simple daily activities.
That’s why women often feel more “engaged”, stay consistent longer, and start seeing results faster.
settings.gggxLjRu8yN_text:
Eloa is designed to stay in place thanks to its structured 3D zones.
If rolling happens, it’s usually a sizing issue — check the size guide (and size up if you’re between sizes).
settings.ggkDSqjyiH9_text:
To keep your garment looking new:

✔ Machine wash cold

✔ Wash with like colors

✔ Tumble dry low or hang dry for best results
settings.ggo6IN6uaum_text:
🚚 Fast & Secure Shipping — Worldwide 🌍

 

🇺🇸 US Orders
If your item is in stock at our US warehouse, expect delivery in 3–5 business days.
Otherwise, allow 7–12 business days, depending on availability.

 

🇬🇧 UK Orders
Most UK deliveries arrive within 7–12 business days, depending on availability.

 

🌐 International Orders
Most international deliveries arrive within 7–14 business days, depending on your location.

 

📦 Order Tracking
As soon as your order ships, you’ll receive a tracking number by email to monitor your delivery in real time.

 

🛡️ Shipping Guarantee
If your item arrives damaged, don’t worry — you’re protected by our Shipping Guarantee.
Just contact us, and we’ll send you a free replacement. No hassle. No extra cost.

settings.ggQWOj2i3eA_text:
Instant Sculpting Effect. Better Posture. Visibly Flatter Stomach ✨

 

✅ Refine Your Waist & Accelerate Weight-Loss Results

The compressive fabric targets the stomach, hips, and back to instantly smooth the silhouette and create a firmer, more defined waist — helping you look leaner right away while supporting faster weight-loss results over time.
No workouts required. No creams. Just intelligent 3D support you can feel from day one.

 

🔥 Burn More Calories Every Day

(Through posture correction & muscle engagement)

3D compression gently activates key muscles and corrects posture throughout the day, helping your body stay more engaged — even at rest.
Better alignment + subtle muscle activation = higher daily calorie expenditure during normal movement.

Not a fat burner. A smarter way to help your body work harder, naturally.

 

💖 Better Posture. Lifted Bust. Real Confidence

Improved posture doesn’t just make you look taller and slimmer — it also supports and lifts the bust naturally, creating a more balanced, sculpted upper body.
A refined waist, upright posture, and supported chest completely change how you carry yourself — and it shows.

You stand taller.
Your silhouette looks more defined.
You feel confident while the weight is coming off.
